debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
x : PersistenceSubmodule M
hx : x ∈ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN
a : PersistenceSubmodule M
ha : a ≤ x
ha' : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})
⊢ a ≤ ⊥

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, exists_prop] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hNx⟩
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN

      intro y hy
      simp at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨M', hM', hy⟩, hy'⟩
      by_cases hM'_eq_N : M' = N
      · subst hM'_eq_N
        left
        exact ⟨hy, hy'⟩
      · right
        refine ⟨⟨M', hM', hM'_eq_N⟩, hy⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := hB_indep.disjoint_sSup (by aesop) (by aesop) (by aesop)
    have h_disj' : Disjoint x (sSup (⋃ (M') (_ : M' ∈ D ∧ M' ≠ N), B M' (by aesop))) := by
      apply D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_sSup
      · aesop
      · intro y hy
        simp at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨M', ⟨hM', hM'_ne⟩, hy⟩
        apply Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset hy
        apply Set.iUnion_subset
        intro z hz
        apply Set.iUnion_subset
        intro _
        aesop
      · intro h_contra
        simp at h_contra
        rcases h_contra with ⟨M', ⟨hM', hM'_ne⟩, hM'_eq_x⟩
        have h_eq : M' = N := by
          rw [← hNx, ← hM'_eq_x]
          exact (hB N hN).symm ▸ (hB M' hM').symm ▸ le_antisymm (le_sSup_of_le hM' (le_rfl)) (le_sSup_of_le hN (le_rfl))
        contradiction
    have h_disj_total : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by

            rw [sSup_union, hB_sub, sSup_union]
        _ := by
          apply Disjoint.sup_right
          · exact h_disj
          · exact h_disj'
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj_total) ha ha'

    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN

        -- This approach is getting too complex. Instead, note that since D is sSupIndep,

        sorry
      subst h_eq
      exact y_in_B
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).le ha h_le_sSup

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN_mem, hx_in_B⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN_mem) := hB N hN_mem
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN_mem) := hB' N hN_mem
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN_mem) \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup hx_in_B (Set.subset.refl _) (by simp)
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN_mem) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      intro y hy
      obtain ⟨y_in_union, y_ne_x⟩ := Set.mem_diff.mp hy
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hy_in_B⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp y_in_union
      obtain ⟨hM'_mem, hy_in_B_M'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hy_in_B
      have h_eq : M' = N := by
        have h_sub : (B M' hM'_mem) ⊆ (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) := by
          intro z hz
          exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨M', hM'_mem, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hM'_mem, hz⟩⟩
        have h_disj' : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by
          apply sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup
          · exact D.sSupIndep'
          · exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, hN_mem, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN_mem, hx_in_B⟩⟩
          · intro z hz
            simp at hz
            aesop
          · simp
        have h_y_le_sSup : y ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := le_sSup hy
        have h_x_le_sSup : x ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := by
          apply le_sSup
          simp
          aesop
        have h_bot : x ⊓ y = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj'
        have h_y_le_N : y ≤ N := by
          rw [← h_sSup_B]
          apply le_sSup
          exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hM'_mem, hy_in_B_M'⟩
        have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := by
          rw [← h_sSup_B]
          apply le_sSup
          exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN_mem, hx_in_B⟩
        have h_eq_or_disj : M' = N ∨ Disjoint M' N := by
          apply Or.intro_left
          have h_M'_in_D : M' ∈ D := hM'_mem
          have h_N_in_D : N ∈ D := hN_mem
          by_cases h_eq : M' = N
          · exact h_eq
          · have h_disj_M'_N : Disjoint M' N := D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne h_M'_in_D h_N_in_D h_eq
            have h_y_le_M' : y ≤ M' := by
              rw [← hB M' hM'_mem]
              apply le_sSup
              exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hM'_mem, hy_in_B_M'⟩
            have h_x_le_M' : x ≤ M' := by
              rw [← hB M' hM'_mem]
              apply le_sSup
              exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hM'_mem, hx_in_B⟩
            have h_x_le_inf : x ≤ M' ⊓ N := le_inf h_x_le_M' h_x_le_N
            have h_inf_bot : M' ⊓ N = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj_M'_N
            have h_x_bot : x = ⊥ := by
              apply le_antisymm
              · exact h_x_le_inf.trans (by rw [h_inf_bot])
              · apply bot_le
            have h_contra : ⊥ ∈ D := by
              rw [← h_x_bot]
              exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, hN_mem, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN_mem, hx_in_B⟩⟩
            exact D.not_bot_mem' h_contra
        cases h_eq_or_disj with
        | inl h_eq => exact h_eq
        | inr h_disj' =>
          have h_y_le_M' : y ≤ M' := by
            rw [← hB M' hM'_mem]
            apply le_sSup
            exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hM'_mem, hy_in_B_M'⟩
          have h_x_le_M' : x ≤ M' := by
            rw [← hB M' hM'_mem]
            apply le_sSup
            exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hM'_mem, hx_in_B⟩
          have h_x_le_inf : x ≤ M' ⊓ N := le_inf h_x_le_M' h_x_le_N
          have h_inf_bot : M' ⊓ N = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj'
          have h_x_bot : x = ⊥ := by
            apply le_antisymm
            · exact h_x_le_inf.trans (by rw [h_inf_bot])
            · apply bot_le
          have h_contra : ⊥ ∈ D := by
            rw [← h_x_bot]
            exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, hN_mem, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN_mem, hx_in_B⟩⟩
          exact D.not_bot_mem' h_contra
      subst h_eq
      exact hy_in_B_M'
    have h_a_le_bot : a ≤ ⊥ := by
      have h_a_le_x : a ≤ x := ha
      have h_a_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN_mem) \ {x}) := h_le_sSup_diff
      have h_a_le_inf : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN_mem) \ {x}) := le_inf h_a_le_x h_a_le_sSup_diff
      have h_inf_bot : x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN_mem) \ {x}) = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
      rw [h_inf_bot] at h_a_le_inf
      exact h_a_le_inf
    exact h_a_le_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have hB_ind : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have hB_sub : B N hN ⊆ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN := by
      intro y hy
      exact ⟨N, hN, hy⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply hB_ind.disjoint_sSup
      · exact hx
      · intro y hy
        exact hy
      · simp [hx]
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le_sSup
      · intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨hy₁, hy₂⟩
        exact ⟨N, hN, hy₁⟩
      · exact ha'
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans h_le

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN', hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    have h_indep_N : sSupIndep (B N hN') := hB' N hN'
    have h_x_in_B : x ∈ B N hN' := hx
    have h_sSup_B : sSup (B N hN') = N := (hB N hN').symm
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN') \ {x})) := h_indep_N x h_x_in_B
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le_sSup_diff
      · exact h_x_in_B
      · intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion₂, exists_prop, and_imp] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', hM'', hy⟩
        subst_vars
        exact hy
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).mp (le_inf_of_le_left ha h_le_sSup_diff)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup (by aesop) (by aesop)
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le
      · exact (Set.iUnion_subset_iUnion fun N' => Set.iUnion_subset_iUnion fun hN' =>
          if h_eq : N' = N then by
            subst h_eq
            exact Set.subset_union_of_subset_right (Set.subset_union_of_subset_left (by aesop) _) _
          else by
            exact Set.subset_union_of_subset_right (Set.subset_union_of_subset_right (by aesop) _) _)
      · exact ha'
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans h_le

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (hB' N hN) (Set.mem_of_mem_insert hx)
      intro h_contra
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_true] at h_contra
      exact h_contra.2
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le
      · use N, hN
        exact hx
      · exact ha'
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans h_le

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN', hx''⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx'
    have h_sSup_N : N = sSup (B N hN') := hB N hN'
    have h_sSupIndep_N : sSupIndep (B N hN') := hB' N hN'
    have h_x_in_B : x ∈ B N hN' := hx''
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN') \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_N.disjoint_sSup_mem h_x_in_B
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le (sSup_le_sSup (Set.iUnion₂_subset_Icc _ _))
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion₂, and_imp, exists_imp]
      intro M' hM' hM'_ne
      obtain ⟨N', hN'', hM'_in_B⟩ := hM'
      have h_eq : N' = N := by
        have h_sub : B N' hN'' ⊆ D.carrier := by
          intro p hp
          exact Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ⟨N', hN'', hp⟩
        have h_disj' : Disjoint N' N := by
          apply sSupIndep.pairwise_disjoint_of_ne D.sSupIndep'
          · exact hN''
          · exact hN
          · intro h_eq
            rw [h_eq] at hM'_in_B
            have hM'_in_D : M' ∈ D := by
              rw [← h_eq]
              exact hN''
            have hM'_eq_x : M' = x := by
              rw [← h_eq] at hM'_in_B
              exact Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ⟨N, hN', hM'_in_B⟩
            contradiction
        have h_M'_le_N' : M' ≤ N' := le_sSup hM'_in_B
        have h_M'_le_N : M' ≤ N := le_sSup_of_le hN (le_sSup hM'_in_B)
        have h_N'_le_N : N' ≤ N := by
          rw [h_sSup_N]
          apply le_sSup_of_le hN
          apply le_sSup hM'_in_B
        have h_N_le_N' : N ≤ N' := by
          rw [← h_sSup_N]
          apply le_sSup_of_le hN'
          apply le_sSup hM'_in_B
        exact le_antisymm h_N'_le_N h_N_le_N'
      rw [h_eq] at hM'_in_B hM'_ne
      exact hM'_in_B
    have h_a_bot : a ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj ha h_le_sSup_diff
    exact h_a_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have hB_sub : B N hN ⊆ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN := by
      intro y hy
      exact ⟨N, hN, hy⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_of_ne
      · exact D.sSupIndep'
      · exact hB_sub
      · intro h_contra
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_true] at h_contra
        aesop
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans ha'

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hNx⟩
    have h_sum : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := h_indep.disjoint_sSup hNx (by aesop) (by aesop)
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) _
      · exact ha'
      · apply sSup_le_sSup
        intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', hMy, hy_ne⟩
        cases' eq_or_ne M' N with h_eq h_ne
        · subst h_eq
          exact hMy
        · exfalso
          have h_disj' : Disjoint N M' := D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne hN hM' (by aesop)
          have h_y_le_M' : y ≤ M' := le_sSup hMy
          have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := le_sSup hNx
          have h_y_le_N : y ≤ N := by
            calc
              y ≤ sSup (B M' hM') := le_sSup hMy
              _ = M' := (hB M' hM').symm
              _ ≤ sSup D := le_sSup hM'
              _ = ⊤ := D.sSup_eq_top'
          have h_y_bot : y = ⊥ := by
            apply le_antisymm
            · exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj').mp (le_inf h_y_le_N h_y_le_M')
            · apply bot_le
          have h_y_not_bot : y ≠ ⊥ := by
            intro h_contra
            rw [h_contra] at hMy
            exact (hB'' M' hM') hMy
          contradiction
    calc
      a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha h_le
      _ ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have h_x_not_bot : x ≠ ⊥ := by
      intro h
      apply D.not_bot_mem
      rw [h] at hN
      exact hN
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup
      · exact x_in_B
      · intro y hy
        exact hy
      · intro h_contra
        apply h_x_not_bot
        exact h_contra
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
      have h_eq : M' = N := by
        apply D.sSupIndep.eq_of_le
        · exact hM'
        · exact le_sSup_of_le hN (le_sSup_of_le y_in_B (le_rfl : y ≤ y))
        · exact le_sSup_of_le hN (le_sSup_of_le x_in_B (le_rfl : x ≤ x))
      subst h_eq
      exact ⟨y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
    calc
      a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha h_le_sSup_diff
      _ ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_mem_B⟩
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN

    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := h_indep_B x x_mem_B
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by

    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans h_le_sSup_diff

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hNx⟩
    have h_sub : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} ⊆ ⋃ (N' : PersistenceSubmodule M) (_ : N' ∈ D), B N' hN' := by
      intro y hy
      exact Set.mem_of_mem_diff hy
    have h_sSup_le : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (⋃ (N' : PersistenceSubmodule M) (_ : N' ∈ D), B N' hN') := by
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      exact h_sub
    have h_a_le_sSup : a ≤ sSup (B N hN) := by
      rw [hB N hN] at *
      exact ha.trans (le_sSup hNx)
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup
      · exact hB' N hN
      · intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨N', hN', hy, hy'⟩
        intro h_eq
        have h_eq_N : N = N' := by
          have h1 : x ∈ B N hN := hNx
          have h2 : x ∈ B N' hN' := by rwa [← h_eq] at hy
          have h_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN ∪ B N' hN') := by
            by_cases h_eq_N : N = N'
            · subst h_eq_N
              exact hB' N hN
            · have h_disj_NN' : Disjoint N N' := by
                apply D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne
                · exact hN
                · exact hN'
                · exact h_eq_N
              have h_sSup_BN : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
              have h_sSup_BN' : sSup (B N' hN') = N' := hB N' hN'
              rw [← h_sSup_BN, ← h_sSup_BN'] at h_disj_NN'
              exact sSupIndep.union hB' hB' h_disj_NN'
          have h_x_in_both : x ∈ B N hN ∩ B N' hN' := ⟨hNx, h2⟩
          have h_nonempty : (B N hN ∩ B N' hN').Nonempty := ⟨x, h_x_in_both⟩
          exact sSupIndep.inter_nonempty h_indep h_nonempty
        subst h_eq_N
        have h_y_in_BN : y ∈ B N hN := hy
        have h_y_ne_x : y ≠ x := hy'
        have h_disj_BN : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
        exact h_disj_BN.disjoint_of_ne hNx h_y_in_BN h_y_ne_x
      · exact fun y hy => by
          simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
          rcases hy with ⟨N', hN', hy, hy'⟩
          intro h_eq
          have h_eq_N : N = N' := by
            have h1 : x ∈ B N hN := hNx
            have h2 : x ∈ B N' hN' := by rwa [← h_eq] at hy
            have h_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN ∪ B N' hN') := by
              by_cases h_eq_N : N = N'
              · subst h_eq_N
                exact hB' N hN
              · have h_disj_NN' : Disjoint N N' := by
                  apply D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne
                  · exact hN
                  · exact hN'
                  · exact h_eq_N
                have h_sSup_BN : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
                have h_sSup_BN' : sSup (B N' hN') = N' := hB N' hN'
                rw [← h_sSup_BN, ← h_sSup_BN'] at h_disj_NN'
                exact sSupIndep.union hB' hB' h_disj_NN'
            have h_x_in_both : x ∈ B N hN ∩ B N' hN' := ⟨hNx, h2⟩
            have h_nonempty : (B N hN ∩ B N' hN').Nonempty := ⟨x, h_x_in_both⟩
            exact sSupIndep.inter_nonempty h_indep h_nonempty
          subst h_eq_N
          have h_y_in_BN : y ∈ B N hN := hy
          have h_y_ne_x : y ≠ x := hy'
          have h_disj_BN : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
          exact h_disj_BN.disjoint_of_ne hNx h_y_in_BN h_y_ne_x
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans (ha'.trans h_sSup_le)

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN', hx''⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx'
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN') := hB N hN'
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN') := hB' N hN'
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN') \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup hx'' (Set.subset.refl _) (by simp [hx''])
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      intro y hy
      obtain ⟨hy₁, hy₂⟩ := Set.mem_diff.mp hy
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hy'''⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hy₁
      obtain ⟨hM'', hy''''⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hy'''
      have h_eq : M' = N ∧ hM'' = hN' := by
        apply And.intro
        · have h_sub : B M' hM'' ⊆ B N hN' := by
            intro z hz
            simp_all
          have h_mem : z ∈ B N hN' := h_sub hz
          simp_all
        · have h_sub : B M' hM'' ⊆ B N hN' := by
            intro z hz
            simp_all
          have h_mem : z ∈ B N hN' := h_sub hz
          simp_all
      simp_all
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans h_le_sSup_diff

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iInter, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_sub : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} ⊆ sSup (B N hN) \ {x} := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iInter, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨M', hM', hy⟩, hy'⟩
      rw [hB N hN] at *
      have h_disj : Disjoint (sSup (B N hN)) (sSup (B M' hM')) := by
        apply (D.sSupIndep' N hN M' hM').resolve_left
        intro h_eq
        rw [h_eq] at hy
        exact hy' (by aesop)
      have h_le : y ≤ sSup (B M' hM') := le_sSup hy
      have h_le' : y ≤ sSup (B N hN) := by
        apply le_trans h_le
        exact le_of_eq (by rw [hB M' hM'])
      have h_bot : y ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj h_le' h_le
      exact (le_bot_iff.mp h_bot).symm ▸ (by simp)
    apply (hB' N hN x hx a ha (ha'.trans (sSup_mono h_sub))).trans
    simp

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN', hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN') := hB' N hN'
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN') \ {x})) := hB_indep.disjoint_sSup hx (Set.subset.refl _) (by simp)
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le
      · exact Set.iUnion_subset_iUnion fun N' => Set.iUnion_subset_iUnion fun hN'' =>
          if h_eq : N' = N then
            if h_eq' : hN'' = hN' then
              by simp [h_eq, h_eq']
            else
              by simp_all
          else
            by simp_all
      · exact ha'
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans (le_inf ha h_le)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hNx⟩
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have hB_sub : B N hN ⊆ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN := by
      intro y hy
      exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hy⟩⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply hB_indep.disjoint_sSup
      · exact hNx
      · intro y hy
        exact Set.mem_of_mem_diff hy
      · intro h_contra
        exact Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem h_contra
    have h_le_sSup : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨M', hM', hy'⟩, hy_ne⟩
      have h_eq : M' = N := by
        have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B M' hM') = M' := hB M' hM'
        have h_sSup_eq_N : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
        have h_y_le_M' : y ≤ M' := le_sSup hy'
        have h_y_le_N : y ≤ N := le_sSup (Set.mem_of_mem_diff ⟨hy', hy_ne⟩)
        have h_M'_le_N : M' ≤ N := by
          rw [← h_sSup_eq]
          apply sSup_le
          intro z hz
          have h_z_le_N : z ≤ N := by
            rw [← h_sSup_eq_N]
            apply le_sSup hz
          exact h_z_le_N
        have h_N_le_M' : N ≤ M' := by
          rw [← h_sSup_eq_N]
          apply sSup_le
          intro z hz
          have h_z_le_M' : z ≤ M' := by
            rw [← h_sSup_eq]
            apply le_sSup hz
          exact h_z_le_M'
        exact le_antisymm h_M'_le_N h_N_le_M'
      subst h_eq
      exact Set.mem_of_mem_diff ⟨hy', hy_ne⟩
    calc
      a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'
      _ ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := inf_le_inf_right _ h_le_sSup
      _ ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN', hx''⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx'
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN') := hB N hN'
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN') := hB' N hN'
    have h_x_in_B : x ∈ B N hN' := hx''
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN') \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup_mem h_x_in_B
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop] at hy
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hy'⟩ := hy
      obtain ⟨hM'', hy''⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hy'
      have h_eq : M' = N := by
        have h_sub : M' ≤ D.carrier := by aesop
        have h_unique : M' = N := by
          apply le_antisymm
          · exact le_sSup_of_le hM' (le_rfl : M' ≤ M')
          · exact le_sSup_of_le hN' (le_rfl : N ≤ N)
        exact h_unique
      subst h_eq
      aesop
    have h_a_bot : a ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj ha h_le_sSup_diff
    exact h_a_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have h_x_not_bot : x ≠ ⊥ := by
      intro h
      apply D.not_bot_mem
      rw [h]
      exact hN
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup
      · exact x_in_B
      · intro y hy
        exact hy
      · intro h_contra
        apply h_x_not_bot
        exact h_contra
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le_sSup_of_subset
      · intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨N', hN', y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
        by_cases h_eq : N' = N
        · subst h_eq
          exact ⟨y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
        · exfalso
          have h_disj_NN' : Disjoint N N' := by
            apply D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_sSup
            · exact hN
            · intro z hz
              simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hz
              rcases hz with ⟨_, hN_z, _, _⟩
              exact hN_z
            · intro h_contra
              apply D.not_bot_mem
              rw [h_contra]
              exact hN
          have h_y_le_N' : y ≤ N' := by
            rw [← hB N' hN']
            apply le_sSup
            exact y_in_B
          have h_y_le_N : y ≤ N := by
            apply le_trans ha
            apply le_sSup
            simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp]
            use N, hN, x_in_B
          have h_y_le_inf : y ≤ N ⊓ N' := le_inf h_y_le_N h_y_le_N'
          have h_y_bot : y ≤ ⊥ := by
            rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le] at h_disj_NN'
            exact h_y_le_inf.trans h_disj_NN'
          have h_y_eq_bot : y = ⊥ := by
            apply le_bot_iff.mp h_y_bot
          apply hB'' N' hN'
          rw [h_y_eq_bot]
          exact y_in_B
      · exact ha'
    have h_a_le_inf : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha h_le_sSup_diff
    have h_a_bot : a ≤ ⊥ := by
      rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le] at h_disj
      exact h_a_le_inf.trans h_disj
    exact h_a_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have hB_sub : B N hN ⊆ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN := by
      intro y hy
      exact ⟨N, hN, hy⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply hB_indep.disjoint_sSup
      · exact hx
      · intro y hy
        exact Set.mem_of_mem_diff hy
      · exact Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem hx
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le_sSup
      · intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', hy, hy'⟩
        cases' eq_or_ne M' N with h_eq h_ne
        · subst h_eq
          exact hy
        · exfalso
          have h_disj' : Disjoint N M' := by
            apply D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne
            · exact hN
            · exact hM'
            · exact h_ne.symm
          have h_y_le_M' : y ≤ M' := le_sSup hy
          have h_y_le_N : y ≤ N := le_trans h_y_le_M' (le_sSup hM')
          have h_y_bot : y = ⊥ := by
            rw [← le_bot_iff]
            exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj').mp (le_inf_of_le_left h_y_le_N h_y_le_M')
          have h_y_not_bot : y ≠ ⊥ := by
            intro h_contra
            rw [h_contra] at hy
            exact (hB'' N hN) (Set.mem_empty_iff.mp (by simpa using hy))
          contradiction
      · exact ha'
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).mp (le_inf ha h_le)
rfl)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have h_x_not_bot : x ≠ ⊥ := by
      intro h
      apply D.not_bot_mem
      rw [h]
      exact hN
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup (by simp [x_in_B]) (by simp) (by simp)
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp]
      intro M' hM'
      rcases hM' with ⟨N', hN', y, hy, hy'⟩
      subst N'
      aesop
    calc
      a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha h_le_sSup_diff
      _ ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup
      · exact x_in_B
      · intro y hy
        exact Set.mem_of_mem_diff hy
      · intro h_contra
        exact hB'' N hN h_contra
    have h_le : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'
    have h_bot : x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_eq_bot.mp h_disj
    rw [h_bot] at h_le
    exact h_le

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hNx⟩
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have hB_sub : B N hN ⊆ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN := by
      intro y hy
      exact ⟨N, hN, hy⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply hB_indep.disjoint_sSup
      · exact hNx
      · intro y hy
        exact hy
      · intro h_contra
        exact hB'' N hN h_contra
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop, and_imp] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', hMy, hMx⟩
      have h_eq : M' = N := by
        have h_sSup_eq : sSup (B N hN) = N := hB N hN
        have h_sSup_eq' : sSup (B M' hM') = M' := hB M' hM'
        have h_disj_N_M' : Disjoint N M' := by
          apply D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne
          · exact hN
          · exact hM'
          · intro h_eq
            subst h_eq
            exact hMx
        have h_le_N : y ≤ N := by
          rw [← h_sSup_eq]
          apply le_sSup hMy
        have h_le_M' : y ≤ M' := by
          rw [← h_sSup_eq']
          apply le_sSup hMy
        have h_y_bot : y = ⊥ := by
          apply le_bot_iff.mp
          apply le_inf_of_le_left_and_right
          · exact h_le_N
          · exact h_le_M'
          apply disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj_N_M'
        have h_y_not_bot : y ≠ ⊥ := by
          intro h_contra
          exact hB'' N hN (h_contra ▸ hMy)
        contradiction
      subst h_eq
      exact hMy
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).le_trans (le_inf ha h_le)

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN', hx''⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx'
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN') := hB N hN'
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN') := hB' N hN'
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN') \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup hx'' (Set.subset.refl _) (by simp [hx''])
    have h_le_sSup_B_minus : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le (sSup_le_sSup (Set.iUnion₂_subset_iff.mpr fun M hM =>
        if h_eq : M = N then
          by simp [h_eq]; exact Set.iUnion_subset_iff.mpr fun hN'' => by
            simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, ne_eq, not_true]
            intro h_not_eq
            exact Set.subset_insert_of_not_mem h_not_eq _
        else
          by simp [h_eq]))
      exact ha'
    have h_a_bot : a ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj ha h_le_sSup_B_minus
    exact h_a_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      apply (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup
      · exact hx
      · intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
        aesop
      · simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp]
        aesop
    have h_le : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'
    have h_bot : x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ ⊥ := by
      refine le_trans ?_ (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj)
      apply inf_le_inf rfl
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', hy, hy'⟩
      have h_sub : (B M' hM') \ {x} ⊆ (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} := by
        intro z hz
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hz ⊢
        rcases hz with ⟨hz, hz'⟩
        refine ⟨⟨M', hM', hz⟩, hz'⟩
      exact le_sSup_of_le (h_sub hy) (le_sSup hy)
    exact le_trans h_le h_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hNx⟩
    rcases hNx with ⟨hN_mem, rfl⟩
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have hB_sSup : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := hB_indep x hN_mem ha'
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans ha

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hx' (Set.subset_iUnion_of_mem hx') (by simp [hx'])
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      intro y hy
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hy'⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hy
      exact ⟨M', hM', hy'⟩
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans h_le

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hNx⟩
    have hB_indep : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have hB_sub : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} ⊆ (B N hN) \ {x} ∪ (⋃ (M) (hM) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM) := by
      intro y hy
      simp at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨M, hM, hyM⟩, hyx⟩
      by_cases h_eq : M = N
      · subst h_eq
        exact Or.inl ⟨hyM, hyx⟩
      · exact Or.inr ⟨M, hM, h_eq, hyM⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := hB_indep.disjoint_sSup (by aesop) (by aesop) (by aesop)
    have h_le_sSup_other : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ (M) (hM) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM) := by
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      rcases hB_sub hy with h | h
      · exact le_sup_left_of_le (le_sSup h)
      · exact le_sup_right_of_le (le_sSup h)
    have h_disj_other : Disjoint (sSup (B N hN)) (sSup (⋃ (M) (hM) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM)) := by
      apply sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_of_disjoint_family
      · intro M hM
        intro P hP
        rcases hP with ⟨Q, hQ, hPQ⟩
        exact D.sSupIndep'.disjoint_of_ne hN hQ (by aesop)
      · intro M hM
        exact hB' M hM
    have h_a_le_bot : a ≤ ⊥ := by
      calc
        a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := inf_of_le ha ha'
        _ ≤ x ⊓ (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ (M) (hM) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM)) := inf_le_inf_right _ h_le_sSup_other
        _ ≤ (x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) ⊔ (x ⊓ sSup (⋃ (M) (hM) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM)) := by
          apply inf_sup_distrib_left
        _ ≤ ⊥ ⊔ ⊥ := by
          constructor
          · exact disjoint_iff.mp h_disj
          · apply le_bot_of_disjoint
            apply Disjoint.mono _ h_disj_other
            · exact le_sSup_of_mem hNx
            · apply sSup_le_sSup
              intro y hy
              rcases hy with ⟨M, hM, h_ne, hyM⟩
              exact le_sSup_of_mem ⟨M, hM, hyM⟩
        _ = ⊥ := by simp
    exact h_a_le_bot

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    obtain ⟨hN', hx⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN') \ {x})) := (hB' N hN').disjoint_sSup (Set.mem_of_mem_insert hx) (Set.subset.refl _) (by simp [hx])
    have h_le : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'
    have h_le' : x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := inf_le_inf rfl (sSup_le_sSup fun y hy => by
      obtain ⟨M, hM, hy⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hy
      obtain ⟨hM', hy⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hy
      aesop)
    have h_bot : x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_eq_bot.mp h_disj
    calc
      a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := h_le
      _ ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN') \ {x}) := h_le'
      _ = ⊥ := h_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp, exists_prop] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have h_x_not_bot : x ≠ ⊥ := by
      intro h
      apply D.not_bot_mem
      rw [h]
      exact hN
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup (by aesop) (by aesop) (by aesop)
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le_sSup_diff
      · exact ha'
      · intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp, exists_prop] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
        have h_eq : M' = N := by
          apply D.sSupIndep.eq_of_le
          · exact hM'
          · exact hN
          · rw [hB M' hM']
            apply le_sSup
            exact y_in_B
        rw [h_eq] at y_in_B
        exact ⟨y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
    calc
      a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha h_le_sSup_diff
      _ ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp h_disj

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp] at hx ha'
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, x_in_B⟩
    have h_sSup_B : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    have h_sSupIndep_B : sSupIndep (B N hN) := hB' N hN
    have h_x_not_bot : x ≠ ⊥ := by
      intro h
      apply D.not_bot_mem
      rw [h]
      exact hN
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := h_sSupIndep_B.disjoint_sSup x_in_B
      (Set.subset.rfl) (by simp [h_x_not_bot])
    have h_le_sSup_diff : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_sSup_of_le _ ha'
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp]
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨M', hM', y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
      exact ⟨M', hM', y_in_B, y_ne_x⟩
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).trans h_le_sSup_diff
